description_long: This clock tower features a rich, dark wooden structure with ornate decorative elements, including turned columns and finials on the upper section. The front showcases a circular clock face with gold Arabic numerals and hands, set above a visible swinging pendulum encased behind glass. The top of the tower is adorned with a highly decorative, Baroque-style crest, complete with scrollwork and finials. The sides reveal the depth of the structure and the internal pendulum mechanism, while the back is mostly plain with a central circular opening for access or sound projection. The overall craftsmanship suggests a blend of both functional and ornamental design, making it a striking focal point in any urban setting. The wood grain and polished finish add to its classic, elegant appearance.
description: A richly detailed wooden clock tower with ornate Baroque-style decorations, a gold-accented clock face, and a visible pendulum behind glass. The structure features turned columns, finials, and a decorative crest, exuding classic elegance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the wooden structure, turned columns, and a glimpse of the pendulum mechanism inside.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with a central circular opening and the ornate crest at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, highlighting the turned columns and the internal pendulum.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the ornate crest, gold-accented clock face with Arabic numerals, and a visible pendulum behind glass.
attribute_clock_face_design: The clock face is circular with a white background, gold Arabic numerals, and gold hands. It is bordered by a gold ring and features minute markings. The design is classic and elegant, with no additional decorative motifs on the face itself.
attribute_tower_roof_type: ornate crest with finials and scrollwork
